name: Browser
description: Native in-app browser surface for previewing HTML files and viewing live URLs
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.tagline: Preview HTML files and browse live URLs without leaving Nimbalyst
marketplace.longDescription: Opens .html files in a real Chromium browsing context, with a URL bar, back/forward, reload, and screenshot capture. The page is rendered by a main-process WebContentsView positioned over the editor tab, so iframe-blocking sites (X-Frame-Options, CSP frame-ancestors) load normally. Toggle to source mode at any time to edit raw HTML in Monaco.
highlights: Full Chromium rendering, not an iframe -- iframe-blocking sites load
Toolbar with URL bar, back/forward, reload, open external, screenshot
Source-mode toggle to edit raw HTML in Monaco
Workspace-scoped local preview server for relative asset resolution
